name: milestone-driver
description: Drives a GitHub milestone to completion: for each issue it finds the root cause (or stops), dispatches a TDD implementer subagent, runs unit + targeted UI tests, runs code review, opens a PR, and auto-merges to the integration branch on CI green — all behind mechanical git and PreToolUse hooks that make the discipline un-bypassable. Stack-agnostic via a thin per-repo profile.
